sensors.name: Terrestrial Laser Scanners (TLS)
sensors.specs: Equipped with state-of-the-art TLS systems including RIEGL, Optech ILRIS 3D, and FARO FocusS sensors for high-precision, millimeter-accuracy 3D documentation, heritage preservation, and forestry morphology.

sensors.name: Mobile & UAV LiDAR Sensors
sensors.specs: Features lightweight Velodyne Puck LiDAR sensors and Trimble V10 Imaging Rovers, integrated with microdrones and mobile platforms for mapping dynamic urban environments and extracting road geometry.

sensors.name: Geodetic & GNSS Infrastructure
sensors.specs: Hosts an IGS-standard Continuously Operating Reference Station (CORS) with Trimble Alloy GNSS receivers and Choke Ring Antennas. Fleet includes Trimble R10/R8/R4 GNSS receivers and Trimble S8/S5 Robotic Total Stations.

sensors.name: Precision Gravimeters
sensors.specs: High-precision terrestrial gravity measurement utilizing Autograv CG-6 and gPhone Mg LaCoste gravimeters for advanced geoid modeling and earth system dynamics.

vehicles.name: Mobile Mapping System (MMS) Vehicle
vehicles.description: A custom-configured survey vehicle serving as a land-based mobile mapping platform. Integrated with laser scanners, high-grade IMUs, and GPS/GNSS receivers to capture complex roadway environments, pole-like structures, and urban feature data at highway speeds.

datasets.name: Ke-MLS Urban Mobile LiDAR Dataset
datasets.description: A large-scale, accurately labelled mobile LiDAR dataset captured from an Indian urban region. Extensively utilized for benchmarking deep learning architectures and 3D semantic segmentation of complex cityscapes.
datasets.access: Published in Environment and Planning B: Urban Analytics and City Science.

datasets.name: Shivalik Range Tree Scan Dataset
datasets.description: A comprehensive dataset combining Terrestrial and Airborne Laser Scanning of trees in the Shivalik Range, India. It includes field measurements and distinct leaf–wood classifications for precision forestry upscaling.

datasets.name: LADS (LiDAR Adaptation Dataset Suite)
datasets.description: A specialized dataset suite designed alongside the ReaLiTy framework for LiDAR adaptation across various sensors and adverse weather conditions, significantly aiding in sim-to-real gap reduction.

computing.name: Deep Learning & Point Cloud Simulation Cluster
computing.description: High-performance computing infrastructure featuring multi-GPU arrays (e.g., NVIDIA A100 architectures) and high-speed NVMe storage. Specifically optimized for training 3D Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), processing massive point clouds, 3D Gaussian Splatting, and running heavy physics-informed scenario simulations.

computing.name: Workstations
computing.description: High-end workstations equipped with institute-wide and multiple-license access to industry-standard softwares, including Terrascan, Microstation, ArcGIS, ERDAS, and Leica Photogrammetric Suite.

platforms.name: SimDaaS
platforms.description: A cutting-edge simulation platform commercialized through SimDaaS Autonomy Pvt. Ltd. Used extensively for the design, training, and testing of autonomous vehicle perception systems under physically accurate simulated conditions.

platforms.name: Limulator
platforms.description: An award-winning, comprehensive software tool for simulating LiDAR sensors and generating point cloud data inside the laboratory. Widely adopted globally as an educational and research tool with over 10,000 downloads.

platforms.name: LASViewer & LASUtility
platforms.description: In-house developed software suites for advanced LiDAR data visualization (including immersive 3D viewing), data measurement, marking, trimming, and seamless format conversion.

platforms.name: Smart Sprayer AI
platforms.description: An intelligent, LiDAR-guided tractor-mounted orchard spraying system designed to identify tree morphology in real-time and apply treatments only where required, enhancing precision agriculture.
